2025/26 Season · Gameweek 38

Dallas Premier League

12-team Sleeper EPL dynasty fantasy

Featured Manager · GW38

erozier wins the 2025/26 DPL title

Wire-to-wire champion finishes 25-13 with the league's best offense

After 38 weeks, the DPL crown belongs to erozier. He took the top of the table early, defended it through every challenger that emerged, and finished three games clear of JordiCarb in second place. The road wasn't perfect — bjennings28 stunned him in GW33, and Flabiano9 spoiled the victory lap with a 52.5 to 31.75 finale upset in GW38 — but the cushion he built across the spring made the math academic for weeks. He led the league in points-for (3,492.50) and finished with the largest scoring margin of any manager. The 2025/26 DPL champion.
